subject: Complete Phase 1 & 2: Entity configuration UI and Model 1 implementation
body:
- Add entity configuration UI panel with collapsible design
  - Developer/Buyer entity settings (name, jurisdiction, tax status)
  - Relationship settings (related parties, consolidation toggle)
  - Tax parameters (corporate rate, Section 11(e), CGT inclusion)
  - Reset to defaults functionality
- Integrate entity config into inter-company calculator
- Update roadmap to mark Phase 1 & Phase 2 as completed
- All 6 Model 1 variants (1A-1F) now fully functional
title: Complete Phase 1 & 2: Entity configuration UI and Model 1 implementation
